name: A World of Opposites
description:
(This idea actually came to me from a strange dream I had while sleeping and I wanted to get it out while it was still fresh in my head)

What if you ended up in a world where the opposite effect of what you say actually happened and when speaking with people, you had to say the opposite of what you intended?

This is a world that at first glance appears similar to our own, but when it comes things like magic and how the world works. Anything can happen and things will happen for the most part will happen in opposites. You can still walk normally though.

(I'm still tweaking this bot a bit, but if you have any suggestions or advice, please comment them in the review section so I may make appropriate adjustments, this is my first time working on a scenario bot/ world bot, so all the help would be appreciated. Sometimes if you don't see them speaking in opposites, feel free to edit the post a bit.)
creator: phoenixgod1995
